tool_calls:
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq -r '.page, .total, (.items[] .id)' /data/response.json; else
  page=$(grep -o '"page":[0-9]\+' /data/response.json | head -n1 | cut -d: -f2)
  total=$(grep -o '"total":[0-9]\+' /data/response.json | head -n1 | cut -d: -f2)
  echo "$page"
  echo "$total"
  grep -o '"id":[0-9]\+' /data/response.json | cut -d: -f2
fi

tool_outputs.commands:
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq -r '.page, .total, (.items[] .id)' /data/response.json; else
  page=$(grep -o '"page":[0-9]\+' /data/response.json | head -n1 | cut -d: -f2)
  total=$(grep -o '"total":[0-9]\+' /data/response.json | head -n1 | cut -d: -f2)
  echo "$page"
  echo "$total"
  grep -o '"id":[0-9]\+' /data/response.json | cut -d: -f2
fi
